elements.original_description: A person hiding their face with their hands, looking embarrassed, pure white background, Midjourney-style detail
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a person hiding their face with both hands, looking visibly embarrassed and flustered. Cinematic, intimate lighting with a soft focus on the subject's expressive posture. The person is centered on a pure, seamless white studio background. High resolution, sharp details, captured with a professional portrait lens to evoke a sense of vulnerability and shame, as implied by the context. Midjourney-style hyper-detailed rendering and atmospheric quality.
